title: Classical Greek society
description: Test your knowledge of ancient Greek culture and society!

assessment_items.question_content:
Which of these choices best describes ancient Greece?

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Ancient Greece was not fully unified by roadways.

choices.content: a network of similar city-states often separated by geographic barriers
a nation fully unified by roadways and common language
a society that valued the Olympic Games above all else

assessment_items.question_content:
What were some different ways through which religion was expressed in Greece?

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Religion was sometimes expressed through sporting events.

assessment_items.question_content:
The main purpose of the _agora_ was to

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: The _agora_ did not limit people to staying in the city.

choices.content: limit interactions between the wealthy elite and the poor
keep members of a polis confined to the city and not living in the surrounding farm area
create a shared space that helped cement a social identity
